Short CV

Ay√ßa DEMńįR YILDIRIM received her undergraduate degree from Marmara University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Midwifery in 2005. She completed her master's degree in the Department of Public Health at Marmara University in 2011. She completed her doctorate education at Istanbul University-CerrahpaŇüa Women's Health and Diseases Nursing Department in 2022.
